description: Slide to the number of custom content elements your project needs. Each one is built by the creators from €390, passes the same audit as the stock 244, and ships with a backend preview. Need standing capacity instead? Creator Care adds 4 dev hours a month for €490.

tiers.included_features: One audit-clean element, backend preview included
A small family: card, list, and detail variants
A full custom group in your content wizard
Your own element library, built by the creators
